# Compiled Java files

*.class

# Log files

*.log

# Runtime generated files

Bill_*.txt
session_autosave.txt

# VS Code settings (optional)

.vscode/

# IntelliJ IDEA files (safe to ignore even if not used)

.idea/
*.iml
*.iws
*.ipr

# OS generated files

.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Build output directories

out/
build/

# Java archives (optional, if you generate them)

*.jar
*.war
*.ear
